title: Draft sequencing enforcement plan
summary: Plan targets: treat active_tx tx_id 'none' as inactive for tx.begin gating; enforce verify.start before verify pass/commit; ensure rebuild truncation reports invalid ordering; harden ops_start_task/ops_update_task tx_id checks; add tests for sequencing and rebuild stability.
acceptance_criteria: Sequencing enforcement plan maps each reported error to a concrete fix.
Plan specifies ordering guarantees for verify/commit and task lifecycle tools.
Plan includes test coverage updates required to maintain >= 90%.

steps.description: Summarize findings from p1-t1 and extract ordering gaps tied to reported errors.
Define concrete sequencing rules to enforce in `src/` for verify/commit and task lifecycle.
Draft implementation outline and required tests to validate ordering and tx integrity.

notes: Implementation outline: update state_store._validate_tx_event_invariants to treat tx_id 'none' as inactive and avoid false active-tx blocking on tx.begin.
Enforce verify lifecycle ordering in state_store/commit_manager so verify.pass and commit.start require verify.start/verify.pass state.
Update state_rebuilder to surface invalid ordering details and avoid stale active_tx after rebuild truncation.
Add tests for verify/commit ordering, ops_start_task/ops_update_task tx_id gating, and rebuild truncation behavior.
